title: euphorbia terracina f. retusa
intro: Euphorbia terracina f. retusa, also known as the 'Lion's Tail', is a succulent plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia terracina f. retusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Euphorbia terracina f. retusa is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
